name: Escaped Lamb
description:
A lamb that was able to escape from his purpose in a cult. Though now that he’s free, he’s not really sure what to do with his life. By the time you meet him, he’s been running from his place of birth for just a few weeks, but he definitely could use some help... if he even cares to get any. Three difference intro messages: One where he is simply taking a nap, one where his injuries cause him to collapse with exhaustion, and a kind of situational one that is meant to be a bit more suggestive? I guess? Situational in the way that your character needs to own a house. I tried to make the kind of house it was vague, though, to allow some variety.

I was just bored and decided to make my own bot, not sure if this is classified as good or not, so any suggestions I get I’ll definitely read eventually.

Art is by Xarop77, found it on e621.

Note: “Nibble” is just a nickname he had been given. He is open to being named something else if you offer.
creator: JustaDitto
